title: mespilodaphne tristis var. major
intro:
Mespilodaphne tristis var. major, a lesser-known plant species, is actually a synonym for the plant species,  Murraya koenigii, also known as curry leaf tree, a tropical evergreen tree native to India and Southeast Asia.

This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Murraya koenigii include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing inflammation, and aiding in digestion, making it a valuable plant for maintaining overall health and wellness. Murraya koenigii is traditionally prepared as an herbal tea, oil, or powder, which can be used to make various herbal remedies, such as a curry leaf tea for digestive issues or as an ingredient in traditional Indian medicine, Ayurveda.
